zh.All Saints Churchyard, Ulcombe, Maidston: 英國英格蘭肯特奧爾平頓哥吉拉 沙智 亞德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Arnold St Leger於1352年出生在英國英格蘭肯特武爾可姆時，他的父親Ralph de St Leger26歲，母親Joan Savage20歲。他於1374年與Joanna Cherleton在英國肯特武爾可姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1377年被列為member of parliment。他去世於1399年在他的家鄉享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特奧爾平頓哥吉拉 沙智 亞德。

zh-hans.All Saints Churchyard, Ulcombe, Maidston: 英国英格兰肯特奧爾平頓哥吉拉 沙智 亞德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Arnold St Leger于1352年出生在英国英格兰肯特武爾可姆时，他的父亲Ralph de St Leger26岁，母亲Joan Savage20岁。他于1374年与Joanna Cherleton在英国肯特武爾可姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1377年被列为member of parliment。他去世于1399年在他的家乡享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特奧爾平頓哥吉拉 沙智 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: St
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized spelling of French   St  .   Denis  .

variants.name: Denis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Jacques, Armand, Marcel, Andre, Pierre, Serge, Yvan, Alphonse, Edouard, Francois, Gaetane.  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Roberto, Angel, Francisco, Joaquin, Juan, Manuel, Miguel, Ramon, Rolando.

French, Walloon, Breton, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, Dutch, English, and Portuguese; Spanish and Galician (Denís): from the personal name Denis, Spanish and Galician Denís, from Latin Dionysius ‘(follower) of Dionysos’ (see Dennis ). Compare Dennee .
Ukrainian and Rusyn: variant transliteration of   Denys  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Leger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Camille, Lucien, Pierre, Yvon, Antoine, Aurele, Emile, Jacques, Marcel, Zoel, Adelard.

French (Léger) and English: from the ancient Germanic personal name Leudgari, composed of the elements leud ‘people’ and gari (from garwa) ‘ready, eager’ or gari ‘spear’ and Latinized as Leodegar(ius). The name was borne by a 7th-century Christian saint, bishop of Autun, whose fame contributed to the popularity of the name in France. See also Ledger and St. Leger .
French (Léger): nickname from léger ‘light, superficial’.

variants.name: Lege
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphie, Emile, Gaston, Henri, Leonce, Minus, Numa, Pierre, Rodolph.
German: topographic name meaning ‘swamp’.
Altered form of French Léger (see Leger ).

variants.name: Legere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Armand, Normand, Aurele, Jacques, Adelard, Alban, Antoine, Desire, Eloi, Monique, Yvon.
French (Légère): nickname from légère, a feminine form of Léger ‘light, superficial’ (see Leger 2).
Altered form of French   Leger   1 or 2.

variants.name: Lougee
meanings: Channel Islands: altered form of Laugee, a variant of French Lauger, itself either a variant of Léger (see Leger ) or a variant, with fused definite article l', of Auger .

History: The first recorded American bearer of this surname was John Lougee from the isle of Jersey. Born Jean Laugee and by trade a knitter, he was aged c. 18 or 19 when he emigrated to the USA in the late 1600s, settling in Exeter, NH, where he became known as John Lougee, marrying Anne, the daughter of Colonel Moses Gilman.

variants.name: Ledger
meanings: English: from a Norman personal name, Leodegar, Old French Legier, of ancient Germanic origin (see Leger 1).
English: metonymic occupational name from Middle English legger ‘one who lays stone, a mason’, a derivative of Old English lecgan ‘to lay’.
Americanized form of French   Leger   1.

variants.name: St. Leger
meanings: French (Saint-Léger): habitational name from any of several places in various parts of France named Saint-Léger (from the dedication of their churches to Saint Leodegar, in French St. Léger, the martyred 7th-century bishop of Autun), or a nickname with the prefix Saint as an (ironic) attachment to the personal name or surname Léger (see Leger 1).

Haitian (also Saint-Léger): from Saint-Léger, a nickname, ornamental name, or personal name composed of the French prefix Saint and the personal name Léger (see Leger 1), or perhaps a habitational name from a place in Haiti called Saint-Léger (compare 1 above).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Saint-Léger in La Manche or Saint-Léger-aux-Bois in Seine-Maritime, France (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Arnold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1  Jewish: Yiddish contracted form of   Aaron .
2  English: short form of   Arnold .

en.lifeSummary: When Arnold St Leger was born in 1352, in Ulcombe, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph de St Leger, was 26 and his mother, Joan Savage, was 20. He married Joanna Cherleton in 1374, in Ulcombe, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. In 1377, at the age of 25, his occupation is listed as member of parliment. He died in 1399, in his hometown, at the age of 47, and was buried in All Saints Churchyard, Orpington, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.All Saints Churchyard, Ulcombe, Maidston: All Saints Churchyard, Orpington, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Arnold St Leger est né en 1352, à Ulcombe, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph de St Leger, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan Savage, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Joanna Cherleton en 1374, à Ulcombe, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. En 1377, à l’âge de 25 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliment. Il est décédé en 1399, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à All Saints Churchyard, Orpington, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.All Saints Churchyard, Ulcombe, Maidston: All Saints Churchyard, Orpington, Kent, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Arnold St Leger 1352 in Ulcombe, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de St Leger 26 und seine Mutter Joan Savage 20. Er hat 1374 in Ulcombe, Kent, England Joanna Cherleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1377, als er 25 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliment aufgeführt. Er starb 1399 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in All Saints Churchyard, Orpington, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Joanna Cherleton nel 1374, nel Ulcombe, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1377, all'età di 25 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliment. Morì nel 1399, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a All Saints Churchyard, Orpington, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Arnold St Legerが1352年にイギリスイギリスケントウルコンベで生まれた時，父Ralph de St Legerは26歳，母Joan Savageは20歳であった。1374年にイギリスケントウルコンベでJoanna Cherletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1377年，25歳の時，職業はmember of parlimentと記録されている。彼は1399年に故郷で47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントオルパントンアル サインツ チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints Churchyard, Ulcombe, Maidston: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 르핀그턴 앨 세인츠 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Arnold St Leger(이)가 1352년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 울코브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de St Leger(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Savage(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1374년 영국 켄트 울코브에서 Joanna Cherleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1377년, 25세의 나이로 그의 직업은 member of parliment이었다. 그는 1399년 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 르핀그턴 앨 세인츠 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

ru.All Saints Churchyard, Ulcombe, Maidston: алл сеинц чурчярд, орпингтон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Arnold St Leger родился в 1352 г. в местности улкомб, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph de St Leger было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Savage, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanna Cherleton в 1374 г. в местности улкомб, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1377 году, в возрасте 25 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliment. Он умер в 1399 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности алл сеинц чурчярд, орпингтон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.
